'''

[[Init]]
=== Init (activity)

[role="small", width="50%", float="right", cols="1"]
|===
a|.Inputs
[disc]
 * `double` `lower_bounds[5]`

 * `double` `upper_bounds[5]`

 * `long` `max_iterations`

 * `double` `reference_x` (default `"0"`)

 * `double` `reference_y` (default `"0"`)

 * `double` `reference_z` (default `"1"`)

a|.Throws
[disc]
 * `exception ::bayes_opt::INVALID_BOUNDS`

 * `exception ::bayes_opt::e_sys`
 ** `short` `code`
 ** `string<128>` `what`

a|.Context
[disc]
  * In task `<<optimize>>`
  * Updates port `<<status>>`
|===

Initialize optimizer bounds, scoring reference position, and iteration count

'''

[[AskNext]]
=== AskNext (activity)

[role="small", width="50%", float="right", cols="1"]
|===
a|.Outputs
[disc]
 * `struct ::bayes_opt::suggestion` `params_out`
 ** `double` `params[5]`
 ** `long` `iteration`

a|.Throws
[disc]
 * `exception ::bayes_opt::NOT_INITIALIZED`

 * `exception ::bayes_opt::OPTIMIZATION_FAILED`

a|.Context
[disc]
  * In task `<<optimize>>`
  * Updates port `<<params>>`
  * Updates port `<<status>>`
|===

Generate next parameter vector and publish it on params port

'''

[[UpdateFromMeasure]]
=== UpdateFromMeasure (activity)

[role="small", width="50%", float="right", cols="1"]
|===
a|.Throws
[disc]
 * `exception ::bayes_opt::NOT_INITIALIZED`

 * `exception ::bayes_opt::NO_MEASUREMENT`

 * `exception ::bayes_opt::OPTIMIZATION_FAILED`

a|.Context
[disc]
  * In task `<<optimize>>`
  * Reads port `<<measure>>`
  * Reads port `<<allow>>`
  * Updates port `<<best_result>>`
  * Updates port `<<status>>`
|===

Read latest pose measurement, compute objective score, and update optimizer

'''

=== GetBest (activity)

[role="small", width="50%", float="right", cols="1"]
|===
a|.Outputs
[disc]
 * `struct ::bayes_opt::best` `best_result_out`
 ** `double` `params[5]`
 ** `double` `value`

a|.Throws
[disc]
 * `exception ::bayes_opt::NOT_INITIALIZED`

 * `exception ::bayes_opt::NO_BEST_RESULT`

a|.Context
[disc]
  * In task `<<optimize>>`
  * Updates port `<<best_result>>`
  * Updates port `<<status>>`
|===

Return best parameters and best score found so far

'''
